targets.query: from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and contains(value: r._field, set: ["outdoor_temperature","outdoor_humidity","relative_pressure","wind_speed","wind_gust","rain_rate","uv_index","solar_radiation"])) |> last()

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and contains(value: r._field, set: ["outdoor_temperature","indoor_temperature","outdoor_humidity","indoor_humidity"])) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Wind, Rain, Pressure, UV and Solar

targets.query: from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and contains(value: r._field, set: ["relative_pressure","wind_speed","wind_gust","rain_rate","rain_daily","uv_index","solar_radiation"])) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather" and r._field =~ /battery/) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry" and r.source == "weather") |> keep(columns: ["_time"]) |> unique(column: "_time") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
